title: Code-like content speed
description: Variable names, methods, brackets — coder rhythm
text: function getUserById(userId) { const user = await db.users.findOne({ id: userId }); if (!user) throw new NotFoundError('user'); return user.toJSON(); } export default getUserById; // also: validateInput, checkPermission, logAccess

tips.text: Real code = English words + symbols + brackets
Brackets/braces should flow as natural punctuation

character_tips.anna: Code is just structured English. Train the symbols, the rest is words.
character_tips.maxim: Engineers underrate typing speed — until they need to pair-program.
